title: The missing piece in wealth building.
description: Roger Sousa (Asperum) on the underrated role of financial defence alongside accumulation — protecting assets and planning for a secure retirement.

title: From coding to co-founding: the PiFi Property story.
description: Heshan Jayawardena on building a platform that uncovers hidden potential in properties — and where AI is taking property search next.

title: Navigating property investment.
description: Tim Watson (Bricks to Wealth) on his move from corporate life to founding a buyer's agency, and what strategic property investment really looks like.
